testmode.label: Test Mode
testmode.comment: Use the Mollie test API key to process mock payments.

api_key_live.label: Live API Key
api_key_live.comment: Starts with "live_". Find it in your Mollie dashboard under Developers.

api_key_test.label: Test API Key
api_key_test.comment: Starts with "test_". Find it in your Mollie dashboard under Developers.

credentials_checker.label: Test API Key
credentials_checker.comment: Click to verify that the configured API keys can reach the Mollie API.

debug.label: Debug Logging
debug.comment: When enabled, writes verbose reconcile/refund events to var/log/mollie.log.

fee_type.label: Fee Type
fee_type.comment: Disabled turns off the fee globally. Fixed = flat amount, Percentage = % of subtotal, Combined = both.

fee_fixed.label: Fixed Fee
fee_fixed.comment: Flat surcharge in the store's base currency (e.g. 0.30 for €0.30).

fee_tax_class.label: Fee Tax Class
fee_tax_class.comment: Product tax class applied to the fee. Maho's native tax collector does not automatically tax the payment_fee_amount — this setting is reserved for a future tax hook.

fee_max.label: Maximum Fee
fee_max.comment: Maximum surcharge; empty for no cap.

include_shipping.label: Include Shipping in Fee Base
include_shipping.comment: When Yes, shipping is added to the base before the percentage is applied.

include_discount.label: Include Discount in Fee Base
include_discount.comment: When Yes, discounts reduce the base before the percentage is applied.

order_status_pending.label: Pending-payment order status
order_status_pending.comment: Applied while the customer is at the Mollie checkout, before the payment result is known.

order_status_processing.label: Paid (processing) order status
order_status_processing.comment: Applied after a successful Mollie capture (paid/authorized). State remains "processing".

fee_enabled.label: Apply Mollie Payment Fee
fee_enabled.comment: When Yes, the globally configured Mollie payment fee is added to the order total if this method is selected.

order_status_pending.comment: Applied while the customer is at the Mollie checkout, before the payment result is known.

order_status_processing.label: Paid (processing) order status
order_status_processing.comment: Applied after a successful Mollie capture (paid/authorized). State remains "processing".

fee_enabled.comment: When Yes, the globally configured Mollie payment fee is added to the order total if this method is selected.

mollie_klarnapaylater.label: Mollie - Klarna Pay later (not implemented yet)

order_status_pending.comment: Applied while the customer is at the Mollie checkout, before the payment result is known.

order_status_processing.label: Paid (processing) order status
order_status_processing.comment: Applied after a successful Mollie capture (paid/authorized). State remains "processing".

fee_enabled.comment: When Yes, the globally configured Mollie payment fee is added to the order total if this method is selected.
